command: $pages = (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9222/json' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $target = $null; foreach($p in $pages){ if($p.url -match 'maps.*contrib'){ $target = $p; break } }; if(-not $target){ Write-Output 'No maps page found. Navigating first page to add-a-place...'; $target = $pages[0]; $ws = New-Object System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket; $uri = [Uri]$target.webSocketDebuggerUrl; $ws.ConnectAsync($uri, [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Wait(); $cmd = '{"id":1,"method":"Page.navigate","params":{"url":"https://business.google.com/create"}}'; $bytes = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($cmd); $seg = New-Object ArraySegment[byte] -ArgumentList (,$bytes); $ws.SendAsync($seg, 'Text', $true, [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Wait(); Start-Sleep 5; $buf = New-Object byte[] 8192; $result = $ws.ReceiveAsync((New-Object ArraySegment[byte] -ArgumentList (,$buf)), [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Result; $resp = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($buf, 0, $result.Count); Write-Output "Navigate response: $resp"; $ws.Dispose() } else { Write-Output "Found maps page: $($target.url.Substring(0,80))"; Write-Output "wsUrl: $($target.webSocketDebuggerUrl)"; $ws = New-Object System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket; $uri = [Uri]$target.webSocketDebuggerUrl; $ws.ConnectAsync($uri, [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Wait(); Write-Output 'WS connected'; $cmd = '{"id":1,"method":"Runtime.evaluate","params":{"expression":"document.title + \"|||\" + document.querySelectorAll(\"input\").length + \"|||\" + Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(\"input\")).slice(0,10).map(i => i.name+\'=\'+i.getAttribute(\'aria-label\')+\'=\'+i.type).join(\";;;\")"}}'; $bytes = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($cmd); $seg = New-Object ArraySegment[byte] -ArgumentList (,$bytes); $ws.SendAsync($seg, 'Text', $true, [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Wait(); Start-Sleep 2; $buf = New-Object byte[] 16384; $result = $ws.ReceiveAsync((New-Object ArraySegment[byte] -ArgumentList (,$buf)), [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Result; $resp = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($buf, 0, $result.Count); Write-Output "Page info: $resp"; $ws.Dispose() }
description: PowerShell CDP WebSocket - فحص صفحة Maps مباشرة بدون Playwright
